sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Milan are in excellent form with 4 consecutive wins and no goals conceded in their last 5 matches. Napoli, despite being league leaders, have shown inconsistency with 3 wins and 2 losses in their recent games, conceding in their last 3 matches.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters, Napoli have dominated with wins in both matches (2-1 and 2-0). However, Milan's current defensive solidity at home might challenge Napoli's attacking prowess.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Milan boast a strong defense, conceding the least goals in the league (2), while ranking high in big chances created (2nd). Napoli lead the league with 9 goals scored, but their defense has been less secure compared to Milan.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Milan's home advantage at San Siro, combined with their in-form players like Christian Pulisic (4 goals in 5 matches), could tilt the balance. Napoli's tendency to score early and their league-leading position suggest they remain a significant threat.
